## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

Closes # (issue number, if applicable)

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Chore (deps, CI, tooling)

---

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour
- [ ] TypeScript check passes (`make test-frontend`)
- [ ] Manually tested end-to-end (if applicable)

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`feature/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, `chore/`)
- [ ] Commits follow conventional commit style
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] "Emphasize, never fabricate" principle preserved (LLM cannot invent profile content)
